Caption:
Nobody warned me about this before moving to NL 😅
Save this for your first week.

5 things that genuinely surprised me about the Netherlands 👇
Which one hit hardest? Comment below.

Dutch birthday parties are a whole experience 😂
Has this happened to you?

One cookie. Circle of chairs. Congratulations to the dog. 😂
Dutch people — defend this in the comments 👇

Your Dutch colleague isn't being rude. Promise.
It just takes some getting used to.

Hot take: Dutch directness is just an excuse to be rude.
Dutch people in the comments — go 👇

130 days of rain a year. They don't care. 🚲🌧️
And eventually, neither will you.

Dutch foods that genuinely confused me when I moved here 😅
Save this before your first Albert Heijn trip.

Unpopular opinion: cycling in Dutch rain is actually fine.
It took me 6 months to accept it. Now I don't think twice.

There is a right way to eat a stroopwafel. ☕
Don't skip the ritual.

€14,83 each. Not a penny more, not a penny less. 😂
Welcome to the Netherlands.

Going Dutch on a first date is a red flag. Change my mind.
The Dutch will have thoughts about this 👇

They offered me this on my first day at work 💀
Drop is… an acquired taste. Comment if you agree.

I said what I said. Drop is disgusting.
Prove me wrong in the comments 👇

Rule #1 in the Netherlands: never walk in a bike lane. 🚲
You will learn this the hard way otherwise.

Want to see a doctor in NL? Start planning now. 📅
Spontaneity is not a Dutch value.
